---
title: "Parents\' Educational Union, The"
---

## Parents\' Educational Union, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This organization  (later the Parents\' National Education Union) was established in Bradford in 1887 by Charlotte Mason (1842-1923).  It was intended to encourage and support those educating their children at home, and prospers to the present day.  CMY deplored the fact that it was non-denominational.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
